title: gladiolus decoratus
intro: Gladiolus decoratus, also known as the Sword Lily or Decorated Gladiolus, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Iridaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Gladiolus decoratus are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus decoratus are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
